title: Fix scorecard info tool test contract mismatch

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Fixed shared scorecard info validator contract mismatch: validate_scorecard_info_result now accepts both legacy top-level id and current nested id at additionalDetails.id. Verified by running MCP/tools/scorecard/scorecards_test.py::TestScorecardInfoTool::test_scorecard_info_basic_functionality (pass).
